methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 25 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 42.9x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Ethos Space is a seed-stage space and aerospace company founded by Brogan BamBrogan and Jeff Overbeek, currently operating in stealth mode. The valuation universe comprises 13 comparable companies across the Space & Aerospace sector: 5 public equities (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private firms including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Sierra Space, and Planet Labs.

Standard valuation triangulation methods face material constraints. Peer-median analysis is inapplicable due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage comparables within the narrow seed-focused universe—while 25 same-sector peers exist, none satisfy the filtering criteria for statistical reliability (minimum 3 datapoints required). Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples is similarly blocked: the Space & Aerospace public median trades at 42.9x revenue across the 5-ticker set, but target revenue remains undisclosed, as is typical for stealth-stage private companies.

The absence of reliable quantitative anchors prevents establishing a defensible valuation range at this stage. Forward progress on valuation would require either: disclosed revenue or revenue-proxy metrics (ARR, bookings) from the target; identification of 3+ disclosed seed-stage Space & Aerospace financings with recent valuation terms; or revenue guidance sufficient to apply the public P/S multiple. Until such data materializes, any valuation estimate would lack empirical foundation.
